title: Ganrite Yards of Elrood, Inc.
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ganrite Yards of Elrood, Inc.''' was an [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]]-based [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturing corporation with offices located in the [[Elrood Bazaar]]. They primarily produced clones of other starshipwright's established designs, including the [[Bratilia light freighter]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
